---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected? Please
describe a concrete scenario; abstract requests are hard to
prioritize.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? If you have a shape in mind (API,
UI, CLI, YAML), sketch it.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches could solve the same problem? Why is the one
you propose preferable?

## Scope

- [ ] This is an addition to an existing component.
- [ ] This requires a new ADR (say which).
- [ ] This touches security or credentials (then also read
      [SECURITY_MODEL.md](../../docs/SECURITY_MODEL.md) and
      [CREDENTIALS.md](../../docs/CREDENTIALS.md)).

## Additional context

Links to upstream docs, similar features in related projects, or
prior discussion.
